nodes.label: Unit tests for Web Search API endpoint (/llm-web-search).
Create a mock FastAPI request object with org and user context.
Create a mock BackgroundTasks that records add_task calls.
Mock the permissions_guard dependency to always return True.
Create a valid WebSearchRequest for testing.
Create a valid WebSearchRequest with search_type='deep'.
Mock context data returned by DeepSearchService.fetch_context.
Mock search result returned by WebSearchService.search.
Test complete happy path for web search.
Test deep search with search_type='deep' uses high context.
Test web search returns multiple citation sources.
Test web search with risk flags set to true.
Test web search populates entity metadata correctly.
Test that successful search saves result to MongoDB.
Test that save failure is non-fatal and response is still returned.
Test web search handles empty citations gracefully.
Test 400 error when report_id is not a valid UUID.
Test 400 error when entity_id is not a valid UUID.
Test 400 error when web_search_match_id is not a valid UUID.
Test that invalid search_type is rejected by Pydantic.
Test that empty report_id is rejected.
Test that missing required fields are rejected by Pydantic.
Test 400 error when no web-search-capable provider is available.
Test error when org has no active providers.
Test 404 error when report doesn't exist in MongoDB.
Test 404 error when entity doesn't exist in report.
Test 404 error when web_search_match doesn't exist.
Test 500 error when database configuration is missing.
Tests for parse-failure handling in the background task.      Parse errors occur
Test 422 error when LLM returns plain text instead of JSON.
Test 422 error when LLM response is missing required 'search_summary' field.
Test 422 error when LLM response has malformed JSON.
Test 422 error when DeepSearchService.parse_answer returns None.
Tests for run_web_search_async background task (LLM call → parse → MongoDB write
Success path: event published with status='search_complete'.
Parse-failure path: event published with status='error', error_type='parse_error
Not-found success path: valid business 'no information found' result → search_co
True-empty-provider error path: LLM returned literally nothing (blank) → no_resu
Persistence-failure path: event published with status='error', error_type='persi
Exception path: event published with error_type='internal'.
UnsupportedProviderError path: event published with error_type='web_search'.
Test 500 error when MongoDB connection fails.
Test 500 error when WebSearchService.search raises exception.
Test that handler returns 200 accepted; WebSearchService init failure would occu
Test 500 error when fetch_context raises unexpected exception.
Test OpenAI G42 provider with base_url configuration.
Test that search_type='web' uses 'medium' context size.
Test that search_type='deep' uses 'high' context size.
Test DeepSearchService is initialized with correct organisation_id.
Test WebSearchService is initialized with correct parameters.
Test that provider credentials are passed to WebSearchService.
Test that WebSearchConfigAdapter wraps the config.
Tests for DeepSearchService.parse_answer with prose and multiple JSON blocks.
